Continuation prompt for ₢A_AAS:

  mount A_

  Pace ₢A_AAS is mid-flight. Last commit on this pace: 7f6cb62e
  ("Theurge coverage catchup..."). What's done in prior session:

  ✓ Manifest: added COLOPHON_VOUCH/SUMMON/PLUMB_FULL/PLUMB_COMPACT/REKON/JETTISON
    and FIXTURE_BATCH_VOUCH; four-mode required-list extended; new
    rbtdtm_accepts_valid_batchvouch_manifest unit test.
  ✓ Fast suite: 90→93 green via rbrr_bad_cloud_prefix /
    rbrr_bad_runtime_prefix negatives + rbrr_nonempty_prefix smoke
    (overrides to acme-, asserts RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT propagation).
  ✓ Four-mode extended in-place (Option B over Option A — the
    AAT-decomposed cases are still self-contained, but extending them
    avoids 2x'ing the GCB ordain cost vs. 5 brand-new ordain cycles):
      - conjure_lifecycle: + summon, plumb_full, rekon (image+about+
        vouch+attest yes)
      - bind_lifecycle: + plumb_compact, jettison-pouch, post-jettison
        rekon (pouch=no, image=yes)
  ✓ batch-vouch new standalone fixture: ordain conjure → jettison
    vouch → tally(pending) → rbw-fV → tally(vouched) → abjure. Wired
    into rbte_engine.sh ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE/_COMPLETE; new tabtargets
    rbtd-r.Run.batch-vouch.sh and rbtd-s.SingleCase.batch-vouch.sh.
  ✓ tt/rbtd-b.Build.sh clean, tt/rbtd-t.Test.sh 54/54,
    tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh 93/93.

  Required to wrap: live service-suite green. Run
    tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.service.sh
  which exercises fast (93) + access-probe (4) + four-mode (4
  extended cases) + batch-vouch (1). Expected total: 102 cases. The
  four-mode + batch-vouch cases burn live Cloud Build ordains, so
  allow several minutes per ordain. If anything fails: the case
  trace dirs (printed on each fixture run) hold per-step
  stdout/stderr — diagnose from those before reaching for code
  changes. Notch any test-driven fixes against ₢A_AAS.

  Once green, ask the user about wrap — never auto-wrap.

  Out of scope for this pace (handshaken into AAP per docket): yoke
  code, live burn-in beyond the service suite.

## vvx
Job Jockey Kit - MCP tools for project initiative management

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- rbk-prep-release: Prepare release candidate for upstream delivery
- vvc-BREAK-LOCK: Force-break a stuck VVC lock after a crash.
- vvc-commit: Guarded git commit
- cma-prep-pr: Prepare branch for upstream PR contribution
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

Docket:
  ## Character
  
  Additive test-code catchup. Each work item is a short, mechanical extension — new fast-suite cases, new four-mode cases for recently rewritten functions, a new standalone fixture for batch_vouch. Code all, run suites, notch once; second notch only on test-driven fix.
  
  ## Docket
  
  Today's A_/A6 sweep landed runtime-behavior changes with partial theurge coverage:
  
  - AAK categorical-layout migration — happy path covered by four-mode; rekon, jettison, batch-vouch, summon, plumb, yoke surfaces untested
  - AAL vessel-param drop — abjure + tally signatures exercised; summon (`rbw-fs`) and plumb (`rbw-fpf`/`rbw-fpc`) not
  - AAO tally + batch_vouch rewrites — tally exercised pre- and post-abjure; new two-pass `rbfv_batch_vouch` pending→vouched path untested
  - AAA/AAB resource prefixing — enrollment covered at empty prefix; non-empty-prefix propagation and bad-format negatives absent
  - AAQ/AAR — rekon + jettison rewrites landed but no fixture exercises them
  
  **Pre-requisite**: ₢A_AAT (four-mode-case-split) lands first. New four-mode work here adds cases to the decomposed section rather than inserting steps into a monolith.
  
  ### Work items
  
  1. **Fast-suite negatives + smoke** (`rbtdrf_fast.rs`):
     - `rv_rbrr_bad_cloud_prefix` — invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX formats (uppercase, trailing non-hyphen, >11 chars)
     - `rv_rbrr_bad_runtime_prefix` — same on RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX
     - `rs_rbrr_nonempty_prefix` — smoke with both prefixes populated (e.g., `acme-`), confirm kindle + derived-constant propagation
  
  2. **Four-mode new cases** (appended to the decomposed `RBTDRC_SECTIONS_FOUR_MODE.cases` array from AAT):
     - `summon` — invoke `rbw-fs` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify AAL single-arg signature; image appears in local daemon. Place after `tally_pre`.
     - `plumb_full` — invoke `rbw-fpf` against the same hallmark; verify SBOM + build_info + Dockerfile sections present.
     - `plumb_compact` — invoke `rbw-fpc` against the bind plantuml hallmark; verify compact output shape.
     - `rekon` — invoke `rbw-ir` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify basename listing includes image + about + vouch. Place after `tally_pre` (any time before that hallmark's abjure).
     - `jettison` — invoke `rbw-iJ` on a single ark of the bind plantuml hallmark (pouch or about); verify surgical delete succeeds; expect a subsequent `tally` case to show that hallmark degraded to `incomplete` before the abjure case clears it. Place between `cleanup` and `abjure_bind`.
  
  3. **Batch-vouch standalone fixture** (`rbtdrc_batch_vouch` — new section):
     - `plant_pending` — ordain conjure, then jettison the vouch package surgically (relies on post-AAR jettison grammar), leaving image+about
     - `tally_expect_pending` — confirm `pending` classification + `rbw-fV` recommendation emitted
     - `batch_vouch` — invoke `rbw-fV`
     - `tally_expect_vouched` — confirm transition to `vouched`
     - `cleanup` — abjure
  
     Fallback if plant-via-jettison is entangled: focused unit test of `rbfv_batch_vouch`'s two-pass state machine against mock `zrbfc_list_hallmarks_capture` output. Less integration value but decoupled.
  
  4. **Manifest updates** (`rbtdrm_manifest.rs`):
     - Add RBTDRM_COLOPHON_SUMMON / PLUMB_FULL / PLUMB_COMPACT / BATCH_VOUCH if absent
     - Verify REKON + JETTISON constants already registered
  
  5. **Yoke** — deferred to AAP's live burn-in scope (reliquary-inscribe is there). No code in this pace.
  
  ### Cadence
  
  Code all four touchpoints, run fast suite → crucible suite, notch once when green. Second notch only if test feedback requires a substantive fix.
  
  ### Verification
  
  - Fast suite: 90 → 93 cases green (2 negatives + 1 smoke)
  - Crucible suite: four-mode green with new cases each individually runnable; new batch_vouch fixture green
  - Full `tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.complete.sh` green at pace close (or deferred if container runtime unavailable in the working officium)
  
  ### Out of scope
  
  - Four-mode decomposition (landed under AAT)
  - New test infrastructure beyond additive extensions
  - Handbook prose churn coverage (already covered by `rbtdrf_hb_render` exit-0 assertion)
  - Service-tier coverage (access-probe unchanged)
  - Yoke code (handshaken into AAP)
  
  ### Affiliated commits today
  
  - ₢A_AAK N1–N4: GAR categorical layout
  - ₢A_AAL: vessel-param drop
  - ₢A_AAO: tally + batch_vouch rewrites
  - ₢A_AAA/AAB/AAC: RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX / RUNTIME_PREFIX
  - ₢A6AA6: rbfl_yoke / rbw-dY (deferred to AAP)
  - ₢A_AAQ: rekon rewrite
  - ₢A_AAR: jettison rewrite


Recommended: `jjx_arm` ₢₢A_AAS or mount A_

7ede2fd6  ₢A_AAR    Rewrite rbfl_jettison locator grammar to post-AAK form. URL construction changed from ${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag} to ${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_pkg_path}/manifests/${z_tag} so the package path's sub-namespacing survives intact. Local renamed z_moniker → z_pkg_path throughout. Docstring example updated from pre-AAK rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img to post-AAK hallmarks/H/image:H (mirrors rbfr_wrest's docstring style). Validation prose: 'moniker' → 'package path' in the required-param die message, the case-label 'Expected moniker:tag' → 'Expected package-path:tag', and the empty-check 'Moniker is empty' → 'Package path is empty'. Docket-flagged Rust call-site audit was a no-op: grep for RBTDRM_COLOPHON_JETTISON across Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/ returned zero hits — jettison has no theurge consumers, so the 'check for any that pass pre-AAK locator strings' line in the docket was speculative and there was nothing to fix. Not run from this officium: service suite (no live GCP credentials), crucible suite (container runtime not required for this parsing-only change), live jettison against a known hallmark (no test ark available in this session) — live verification deferred to downstream; the parsing is mechanically equivalent to rbfr_wrest which is already exercised in live pull flows.

Docket:
  ## Character
  
  Additive test-code catchup. Each work item is a short, mechanical extension — new fast-suite cases, new four-mode cases for recently rewritten functions, a new standalone fixture for batch_vouch. Code all, run suites, notch once; second notch only on test-driven fix.
  
  ## Docket
  
  Today's A_/A6 sweep landed runtime-behavior changes with partial theurge coverage:
  
  - AAK categorical-layout migration — happy path covered by four-mode; rekon, jettison, batch-vouch, summon, plumb, yoke surfaces untested
  - AAL vessel-param drop — abjure + tally signatures exercised; summon (`rbw-fs`) and plumb (`rbw-fpf`/`rbw-fpc`) not
  - AAO tally + batch_vouch rewrites — tally exercised pre- and post-abjure; new two-pass `rbfv_batch_vouch` pending→vouched path untested
  - AAA/AAB resource prefixing — enrollment covered at empty prefix; non-empty-prefix propagation and bad-format negatives absent
  - AAQ/AAR — rekon + jettison rewrites landed but no fixture exercises them
  
  **Pre-requisite**: ₢A_AAT (four-mode-case-split) lands first. New four-mode work here adds cases to the decomposed section rather than inserting steps into a monolith.
  
  ### Work items
  
  1. **Fast-suite negatives + smoke** (`rbtdrf_fast.rs`):
     - `rv_rbrr_bad_cloud_prefix` — invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX formats (uppercase, trailing non-hyphen, >11 chars)
     - `rv_rbrr_bad_runtime_prefix` — same on RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX
     - `rs_rbrr_nonempty_prefix` — smoke with both prefixes populated (e.g., `acme-`), confirm kindle + derived-constant propagation
  
  2. **Four-mode new cases** (appended to the decomposed `RBTDRC_SECTIONS_FOUR_MODE.cases` array from AAT):
     - `summon` — invoke `rbw-fs` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify AAL single-arg signature; image appears in local daemon. Place after `tally_pre`.
     - `plumb_full` — invoke `rbw-fpf` against the same hallmark; verify SBOM + build_info + Dockerfile sections present.
     - `plumb_compact` — invoke `rbw-fpc` against the bind plantuml hallmark; verify compact output shape.
     - `rekon` — invoke `rbw-ir` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify basename listing includes image + about + vouch. Place after `tally_pre` (any time before that hallmark's abjure).
     - `jettison` — invoke `rbw-iJ` on a single ark of the bind plantuml hallmark (pouch or about); verify surgical delete succeeds; expect a subsequent `tally` case to show that hallmark degraded to `incomplete` before the abjure case clears it. Place between `cleanup` and `abjure_bind`.
  
  3. **Batch-vouch standalone fixture** (`rbtdrc_batch_vouch` — new section):
     - `plant_pending` — ordain conjure, then jettison the vouch package surgically (relies on post-AAR jettison grammar), leaving image+about
     - `tally_expect_pending` — confirm `pending` classification + `rbw-fV` recommendation emitted
     - `batch_vouch` — invoke `rbw-fV`
     - `tally_expect_vouched` — confirm transition to `vouched`
     - `cleanup` — abjure
  
     Fallback if plant-via-jettison is entangled: focused unit test of `rbfv_batch_vouch`'s two-pass state machine against mock `zrbfc_list_hallmarks_capture` output. Less integration value but decoupled.
  
  4. **Manifest updates** (`rbtdrm_manifest.rs`):
     - Add RBTDRM_COLOPHON_SUMMON / PLUMB_FULL / PLUMB_COMPACT / BATCH_VOUCH if absent
     - Verify REKON + JETTISON constants already registered
  
  5. **Yoke** — deferred to AAP's live burn-in scope (reliquary-inscribe is there). No code in this pace.
  
  ### Cadence
  
  Code all four touchpoints, run fast suite → crucible suite, notch once when green. Second notch only if test feedback requires a substantive fix.
  
  ### Verification
  
  - Fast suite: 90 → 93 cases green (2 negatives + 1 smoke)
  - Crucible suite: four-mode green with new cases each individually runnable; new batch_vouch fixture green
  - Full `tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.complete.sh` green at pace close (or deferred if container runtime unavailable in the working officium)
  
  ### Out of scope
  
  - Four-mode decomposition (landed under AAT)
  - New test infrastructure beyond additive extensions
  - Handbook prose churn coverage (already covered by `rbtdrf_hb_render` exit-0 assertion)
  - Service-tier coverage (access-probe unchanged)
  - Yoke code (handshaken into AAP)

content.content:
1	# jjezs_paddock ₣A_
2	
3	## Context
4	
5	Three interwoven infrastructure cleanups culminating in a depot regeneration:
6	
7	1. **Resource prefixing** (`₢A_AAA`/`₢A_AAB`/`₢A_AAC`) — introduce `RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX` (cloud-visible names: GAR, Cloud Build, GCP) and `RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX` (local container and network names). Enables multi-regime isolation on shared infrastructure.
8	
9	2. **GAR categorical layout migration** (`₢A_AAK`/`₢A_AAL`) — reorganize GAR top-level namespace into three prefixed categories. Dissolves the `<vessel>:<hallmark>-<suffix>` hyphen-suffix scheme and the `vouches/` aggregator. Tabtargets taking `(vessel, hallmark)` simplify to `(hallmark)`.
10	
11	3. **Payor credential subdirectory** (`₢A_AAD`) — move `rbro.env` into a `payor/` subdirectory to match the role-subdirectory pattern already established for RBRA credentials.
12	
13	The depot regen at the tail (`₢A_AAE`) is the hard cutover point. All three threads land before it; depot regen validates the new infrastructure in regenerated form.
14	
15	## Design decisions captured
16	
17	### GAR categorical layout
18	
19	Three top-level namespaces under the cloud prefix:
20	
21	```
22	<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/{image, vouch, pouch, about, attest, diags}
23	<prefix>reliquaries/<date>/<tool>
24	<prefix>enshrines/<base>
25	```
26	
27	Each immediate child of `<prefix>hallmarks` IS a hallmark; the six ark types become plain basename siblings. No more vessel-in-path or suffix-on-tag string grammar.
28	
29	### Vessel identity
30	
31	No longer lives in the GAR path. Resolved on demand from the `vouch` or `about` metadata of the hallmark in question. `ls <prefix>hallmarks/` no longer surfaces vessel at a glance; tally and plumb already read metadata for health, and extend the pattern where operation prose needs the vessel name.
32	
33	### Attest vs vouch
34	
35	Both persist as peer basenames under `<hallmark>/`. Attestations advertise during build for SLSA provenance; vouches check them at consumption. Load-bearing split — retained by design.
36	
37	### Pouch
38	
39	A `FROM scratch` OCI image carrying build context (Dockerfile + supporting files) to Cloud Build's first step. Present for conjure/bind, absent for graft (graft is local push — no GCB involved). Now lives at `<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/pouch` in the new layout.
40	
41	### SUFFIX → BASENAME constant rename
42	
43	`RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_*` constants persist but rename to `RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_*`; their values drop the leading hyphen. Role shifts from "suffix to hyphen-concat" to "literal basename of a sibling file." The concat grammar disappears entirely from ark path construction.
44	
45	### `vouches/` aggregator removal
46	
47	`RBGC_VOUCHES_PACKAGE` existed to enable hallmark-only vouch lookup without knowing the vessel. The new layout delivers the same property naturally — every hallmark has its own `vouch` basename under `<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/`. The aggregator becomes redundant and is deleted.
48	
49	### Cutover discipline
50	
51	Hard cutover — old and new path shapes do not coexist in live code. Depot regen at `₢A_AAE` is the forcing function; all layout work lands before it.
52	
53	## References
54	
55	- `₢A_AAJ` — filesystem-side config-directory naming research (orthogonal to this heat). Decisions recorded in that pace: `rbmm_moorings` umbrella, `rbm*_` prefix family, hard-cutover at depot regen. Filesystem rename itself flows to a separate follow-up heat and is out of this heat's scope.
56	- `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh:122-131` — current ark-suffix constants and `RBGC_VOUCHES_PACKAGE`; this heat renames to `_BASENAME_*` and removes the aggregator.
57	- `Tools/rbk/rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild.sh:712-733` — pouch definition and current concat-based path construction.
58	- `Tools/rbk/rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh:440-650` — current per-suffix HEAD/DELETE dance; collapses to subtree operations in `₢A_AAK`.
59	
60	# jjezs_pace ₢A_AAS
61	
62	## Character
63	
64	Additive test-code catchup. Each work item is a short, mechanical extension — new fast-suite cases, new four-mode cases for recently rewritten functions, a new standalone fixture for batch_vouch. Code all, run suites, notch once; second notch only on test-driven fix.
65	
66	## Docket
67	
68	Today's A_/A6 sweep landed runtime-behavior changes with partial theurge coverage:
69	
70	- AAK categorical-layout migration — happy path covered by four-mode; rekon, jettison, batch-vouch, summon, plumb, yoke surfaces untested
71	- AAL vessel-param drop — abjure + tally signatures exercised; summon (`rbw-fs`) and plumb (`rbw-fpf`/`rbw-fpc`) not
72	- AAO tally + batch_vouch rewrites — tally exercised pre- and post-abjure; new two-pass `rbfv_batch_vouch` pending→vouched path untested
73	- AAA/AAB resource prefixing — enrollment covered at empty prefix; non-empty-prefix propagation and bad-format negatives absent
74	- AAQ/AAR — rekon + jettison rewrites landed but no fixture exercises them
75	
76	**Pre-requisite**: ₢A_AAT (four-mode-case-split) lands first. New four-mode work here adds cases to the decomposed section rather than inserting steps into a monolith.
77	
78	### Work items
79	
80	1. **Fast-suite negatives + smoke** (`rbtdrf_fast.rs`):
81	   - `rv_rbrr_bad_cloud_prefix` — invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX formats (uppercase, trailing non-hyphen, >11 chars)
82	   - `rv_rbrr_bad_runtime_prefix` — same on RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX
83	   - `rs_rbrr_nonempty_prefix` — smoke with both prefixes populated (e.g., `acme-`), confirm kindle + derived-constant propagation
84	
85	2. **Four-mode new cases** (appended to the decomposed `RBTDRC_SECTIONS_FOUR_MODE.cases` array from AAT):
86	   - `summon` — invoke `rbw-fs` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify AAL single-arg signature; image appears in local daemon. Place after `tally_pre`.
87	   - `plumb_full` — invoke `rbw-fpf` against the same hallmark; verify SBOM + build_info + Dockerfile sections present.
88	   - `plumb_compact` — invoke `rbw-fpc` against the bind plantuml hallmark; verify compact output shape.
89	   - `rekon` — invoke `rbw-ir` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify basename listing includes image + about + vouch. Place after `tally_pre` (any time before that hallmark's abjure).
90	   - `jettison` — invoke `rbw-iJ` on a single ark of the bind plantuml hallmark (pouch or about); verify surgical delete succeeds; expect a subsequent `tally` case to show that hallmark degraded to `incomplete` before the abjure case clears it. Place between `cleanup` and `abjure_bind`.
91	
92	3. **Batch-vouch standalone fixture** (`rbtdrc_batch_vouch` — new section):
93	   - `plant_pending` — ordain conjure, then jettison the vouch package surgically (relies on post-AAR jettison grammar), leaving image+about
94	   - `tally_expect_pending` — confirm `pending` classification + `rbw-fV` recommendation emitted
95	   - `batch_vouch` — invoke `rbw-fV`
96	   - `tally_expect_vouched` — confirm transition to `vouched`
97	   - `cleanup` — abjure
98	
99	   Fallback if plant-via-jettison is entangled: focused unit test of `rbfv_batch_vouch`'s two-pass state machine against mock `zrbfc_list_hallmarks_capture` output. Less integration value but decoupled.
100	
101	4. **Manifest updates** (`rbtdrm_manifest.rs`):
102	   - Add RBTDRM_COLOPHON_SUMMON / PLUMB_FULL / PLUMB_COMPACT / BATCH_VOUCH if absent
103	   - Verify REKON + JETTISON constants already registered
104	
105	5. **Yoke** — deferred to AAP's live burn-in scope (reliquary-inscribe is there). No code in this pace.
106	
107	### Cadence
108	
109	Code all four touchpoints, run fast suite → crucible suite, notch once when green. Second notch only if test feedback requires a substantive fix.
110	
111	### Verification
112	
113	- Fast suite: 90 → 93 cases green (2 negatives + 1 smoke)
114	- Crucible suite: four-mode green with new cases each individually runnable; new batch_vouch fixture green
115	- Full `tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.complete.sh` green at pace close (or deferred if container runtime unavailable in the working officium)
116	
117	### Out of scope

121	- Handbook prose churn coverage (already covered by `rbtdrf_hb_render` exit-0 assertion)
122	- Service-tier coverage (access-probe unchanged)

file.content:
# jjezs_paddock ₣A_

## Context

Three interwoven infrastructure cleanups culminating in a depot regeneration:

1. **Resource prefixing** (`₢A_AAA`/`₢A_AAB`/`₢A_AAC`) — introduce `RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX` (cloud-visible names: GAR, Cloud Build, GCP) and `RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX` (local container and network names). Enables multi-regime isolation on shared infrastructure.

2. **GAR categorical layout migration** (`₢A_AAK`/`₢A_AAL`) — reorganize GAR top-level namespace into three prefixed categories. Dissolves the `<vessel>:<hallmark>-<suffix>` hyphen-suffix scheme and the `vouches/` aggregator. Tabtargets taking `(vessel, hallmark)` simplify to `(hallmark)`.

3. **Payor credential subdirectory** (`₢A_AAD`) — move `rbro.env` into a `payor/` subdirectory to match the role-subdirectory pattern already established for RBRA credentials.

The depot regen at the tail (`₢A_AAE`) is the hard cutover point. All three threads land before it; depot regen validates the new infrastructure in regenerated form.

## Design decisions captured

### GAR categorical layout

Three top-level namespaces under the cloud prefix:

```
<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/{image, vouch, pouch, about, attest, diags}
<prefix>reliquaries/<date>/<tool>
<prefix>enshrines/<base>
```

Each immediate child of `<prefix>hallmarks` IS a hallmark; the six ark types become plain basename siblings. No more vessel-in-path or suffix-on-tag string grammar.

### Vessel identity

No longer lives in the GAR path. Resolved on demand from the `vouch` or `about` metadata of the hallmark in question. `ls <prefix>hallmarks/` no longer surfaces vessel at a glance; tally and plumb already read metadata for health, and extend the pattern where operation prose needs the vessel name.

### Attest vs vouch

Both persist as peer basenames under `<hallmark>/`. Attestations advertise during build for SLSA provenance; vouches check them at consumption. Load-bearing split — retained by design.

### Pouch

A `FROM scratch` OCI image carrying build context (Dockerfile + supporting files) to Cloud Build's first step. Present for conjure/bind, absent for graft (graft is local push — no GCB involved). Now lives at `<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/pouch` in the new layout.

### SUFFIX → BASENAME constant rename

`RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_*` constants persist but rename to `RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_*`; their values drop the leading hyphen. Role shifts from "suffix to hyphen-concat" to "literal basename of a sibling file." The concat grammar disappears entirely from ark path construction.

### `vouches/` aggregator removal

`RBGC_VOUCHES_PACKAGE` existed to enable hallmark-only vouch lookup without knowing the vessel. The new layout delivers the same property naturally — every hallmark has its own `vouch` basename under `<prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/`. The aggregator becomes redundant and is deleted.

### Cutover discipline

Hard cutover — old and new path shapes do not coexist in live code. Depot regen at `₢A_AAE` is the forcing function; all layout work lands before it.

## References

- `₢A_AAJ` — filesystem-side config-directory naming research (orthogonal to this heat). Decisions recorded in that pace: `rbmm_moorings` umbrella, `rbm*_` prefix family, hard-cutover at depot regen. Filesystem rename itself flows to a separate follow-up heat and is out of this heat's scope.
- `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh:122-131` — current ark-suffix constants and `RBGC_VOUCHES_PACKAGE`; this heat renames to `_BASENAME_*` and removes the aggregator.
- `Tools/rbk/rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild.sh:712-733` — pouch definition and current concat-based path construction.
- `Tools/rbk/rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh:440-650` — current per-suffix HEAD/DELETE dance; collapses to subtree operations in `₢A_AAK`.

# jjezs_pace ₢A_AAS

## Character

Additive test-code catchup. Each work item is a short, mechanical extension — new fast-suite cases, new four-mode cases for recently rewritten functions, a new standalone fixture for batch_vouch. Code all, run suites, notch once; second notch only on test-driven fix.

## Docket

Today's A_/A6 sweep landed runtime-behavior changes with partial theurge coverage:

- AAK categorical-layout migration — happy path covered by four-mode; rekon, jettison, batch-vouch, summon, plumb, yoke surfaces untested
- AAL vessel-param drop — abjure + tally signatures exercised; summon (`rbw-fs`) and plumb (`rbw-fpf`/`rbw-fpc`) not
- AAO tally + batch_vouch rewrites — tally exercised pre- and post-abjure; new two-pass `rbfv_batch_vouch` pending→vouched path untested
- AAA/AAB resource prefixing — enrollment covered at empty prefix; non-empty-prefix propagation and bad-format negatives absent
- AAQ/AAR — rekon + jettison rewrites landed but no fixture exercises them

**Pre-requisite**: ₢A_AAT (four-mode-case-split) lands first. New four-mode work here adds cases to the decomposed section rather than inserting steps into a monolith.

### Work items

1. **Fast-suite negatives + smoke** (`rbtdrf_fast.rs`):
   - `rv_rbrr_bad_cloud_prefix` — invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX formats (uppercase, trailing non-hyphen, >11 chars)
   - `rv_rbrr_bad_runtime_prefix` — same on RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX
   - `rs_rbrr_nonempty_prefix` — smoke with both prefixes populated (e.g., `acme-`), confirm kindle + derived-constant propagation

2. **Four-mode new cases** (appended to the decomposed `RBTDRC_SECTIONS_FOUR_MODE.cases` array from AAT):
   - `summon` — invoke `rbw-fs` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify AAL single-arg signature; image appears in local daemon. Place after `tally_pre`.
   - `plumb_full` — invoke `rbw-fpf` against the same hallmark; verify SBOM + build_info + Dockerfile sections present.
   - `plumb_compact` — invoke `rbw-fpc` against the bind plantuml hallmark; verify compact output shape.
   - `rekon` — invoke `rbw-ir` against the conjured busybox hallmark; verify basename listing includes image + about + vouch. Place after `tally_pre` (any time before that hallmark's abjure).
   - `jettison` — invoke `rbw-iJ` on a single ark of the bind plantuml hallmark (pouch or about); verify surgical delete succeeds; expect a subsequent `tally` case to show that hallmark degraded to `incomplete` before the abjure case clears it. Place between `cleanup` and `abjure_bind`.

3. **Batch-vouch standalone fixture** (`rbtdrc_batch_vouch` — new section):
   - `plant_pending` — ordain conjure, then jettison the vouch package surgically (relies on post-AAR jettison grammar), leaving image+about
   - `tally_expect_pending` — confirm `pending` classification + `rbw-fV` recommendation emitted
   - `batch_vouch` — invoke `rbw-fV`
   - `tally_expect_vouched` — confirm transition to `vouched`
   - `cleanup` — abjure

   Fallback if plant-via-jettison is entangled: focused unit test of `rbfv_batch_vouch`'s two-pass state machine against mock `zrbfc_list_hallmarks_capture` output. Less integration value but decoupled.

4. **Manifest updates** (`rbtdrm_manifest.rs`):
   - Add RBTDRM_COLOPHON_SUMMON / PLUMB_FULL / PLUMB_COMPACT / BATCH_VOUCH if absent
   - Verify REKON + JETTISON constants already registered

5. **Yoke** — deferred to AAP's live burn-in scope (reliquary-inscribe is there). No code in this pace.

### Cadence

Code all four touchpoints, run fast suite → crucible suite, notch once when green. Second notch only if test feedback requires a substantive fix.

### Verification

- Fast suite: 90 → 93 cases green (2 negatives + 1 smoke)
- Crucible suite: four-mode green with new cases each individually runnable; new batch_vouch fixture green
- Full `tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.complete.sh` green at pace close (or deferred if container runtime unavailable in the working officium)

### Out of scope

- Four-mode decomposition (landed under AAT)
- New test infrastructure beyond additive extensions
- Handbook prose churn coverage (already covered by `rbtdrf_hb_render` exit-0 assertion)
- Service-tier coverage (access-probe unchanged)
- Yoke code (handshaken into AAP)

### Affiliated commits today

- ₢A_AAK N1–N4: GAR categorical layout
- ₢A_AAL: vessel-param drop
- ₢A_AAO: tally + batch_vouch rewrites
- ₢A_AAA/AAB/AAC: RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX / RUNTIME_PREFIX
- ₢A6AA6: rbfl_yoke / rbw-dY (deferred to AAP)
- ₢A_AAQ: rekon rewrite
- ₢A_AAR: jettison rewrite

The four-mode and batch-vouch cases burn live Cloud Build ordains, so this will run for a while.

Launching the service suite now.

content.text:
Diagnosis is clean — this is environmental, not a test-code defect.

**Root cause** (from `transcript.txt:84`):
```
buc_warn rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild.sh:138: Reliquary not found: r260327172456
buc_die  rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild.sh:146: ERROR: [rbfd_ordain] Registry preflight failed — reliquary missing from GAR
```

All three GAR-touching modes (conjure, bind, graft) hit the same reliquary preflight in `rbfd_ordain` and die before any new test code runs. The vessels' `rbrv.env` files all pin `r260327172456` (March 27), and that reliquary no longer exists in GAR — either garbage-collected or the depot rotated. The kludge case is purely local docker (no GAR), which is why it passed.

**Suite breakdown**:
- Fast (93/93) ✓
- Access-probe (4/4) ✓
- Four-mode: kludge ✓ / conjure ✗ / bind ✗ / graft ✗ — all 3 failures bail in the reliquary preflight, not in any new AAS test step
- Batch-vouch: didn't run (engine fail-fast)

**Tension with the docket**: The pace explicitly defers reliquary-inscribe + yoke to AAP ("reliquary-inscribe is there. No code in this pace."). But the wrap criterion is "live service-suite green," which now needs a fresh reliquary and a yoke pass on `rbev-busybox` / `rbev-bottle-plantuml` / `rbev-graft-demo`.

**Two paths forward**:

1. **Refresh reliquary now to unblock AAS verification.** Run `tt/rbw-dI.DirectorInscribesReliquary.sh`, then yoke each of the three conjure vessels via `tt/rbw-dY.DirectorYokesReliquaryInVessel.sh`, then re-run service suite. This consumes AAP-territory operations to satisfy AAS's live-green requirement.

2. **Wrap AAS on offline-green + document the reliquary blocker.** The test code itself is correct and complete; the failure is environmental and orthogonal to what AAS adds. AAP picks up reliquary refresh + yoke + the live burn-in pass, which would then exercise these same four-mode cases as part of its work.

I'd lean toward **path 2** — the docket structure already routes reliquary work to AAP, and AAS's contribution (the test code) is verifiably sound by inspection of the trace (the failing step is preflight, not any AAS-added step). But this is a wrap-criterion call, not a code call, so it's yours.

Which would you like?

message.content: Look for reliquary treatment in the onboarding handbooks.  Do you see a procedure for installing reliquaries there?  This is a great time to see if that handbook is accurate, correct, and properly educational.

15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director First Cloud Build
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -z "${ZRBHODF_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
24	ZRBHODF_SOURCED=1
25	
26	rbho_director_first_build() {
27	  zrbho_sentinel
28	
29	  buc_doc_brief "${RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_BUILD} — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
30	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
31	
32	  local -r z_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
33	
34	  local z_has_director=0
35	  local z_secrets_dir=""
36	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
37	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
38	  fi
39	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
40	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
41	    z_has_director=1
42	  fi
43	
44	  local z_has_depot=0
45	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
46	    local z_line=""
47	    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
48	      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
49	    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
50	  fi
51	
52	  local z_conjure_summoned=0
53	  if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
54	    local z_project_id=""
55	    local z_region=""
56	    if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
57	      z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
58	      z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
59	    fi
60	    if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
61	      local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
62	      local -r z_df_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX}5_repotag.txt"
63	      local -r z_df_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}7_repotag.txt"
64	      if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
65	           > "${z_df_out}" 2>"${z_df_err}"; then
66	        local z_line=""
67	        while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
68	          case "${z_line}" in
69	            "${z_gar_prefix}"*"${z_vessel}:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_summoned=1; break ;;
70	          esac
71	        done < "${z_df_out}"
72	      fi
73	    fi
74	  fi
75	
76	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel" "${z_vessel}"; local -r z_lk_vessel_name="${z_buym_yelp}"
77	
78	  buh_section "${RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_BUILD}"
79	  buh_e
80	  buh_line "This track walks you through the complete ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
81	  buh_line "provision the builder toolchain, ${RBYC_ORDAIN} your first ${RBYC_VESSEL} via"
82	  buh_line "Cloud Build, inspect the result, pull it locally, and clean up."
83	  buh_e
84	  buh_line "You will build ${z_lk_vessel_name} — the same ${RBYC_SENTRY} you"
85	  buh_line "already know from the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} track, but this time built by"
86	  buh_line "Google Cloud Build with full SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}."
87	  buh_e
88	
89	  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
90	  buh_e
91	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "1"; then
92	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
93	  else
94	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
95	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
96	  fi
97	  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
98	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
99	  else
100	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
101	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
102	  fi
103	  buh_e
104	
105	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
106	    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
107	    buh_e
108	    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
109	    buh_e
110	    return 0
111	  fi
112	
113	  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
114	  buh_e
115	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_NAME}=${z_vessel}"
116	  buh_e
117	  buh_line "This sets the ${RBYC_VESSEL} you will build throughout the track."
118	  buh_line "The remaining steps reference it by name."
119	  buh_e
120	
121	  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
122	
123	  buh_step1 "Inscribe the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
124	  buh_e
125	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is a set of six builder tool images (gcloud,"
126	  buh_line "docker, alpine, syft, binfmt, skopeo) that Cloud Build uses during"
127	  buh_line "${RBYC_VESSEL} construction. Without it, the ${RBYC_CONJURE} preflight"
128	  buh_line "check fails."
129	  buh_e
130	  buh_line "Think of it as installing the toolchain before your first build."
131	  buh_line "This is a one-time operation — once inscribed, the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
132	  buh_line "stays in the ${RBYC_DEPOT} until you choose to refresh it."
133	  buh_e
134	  buh_line "Periodically re-inscribe to pick up newer tool versions. All ${RBYC_VESSELS}"
135	  buh_line "share the same ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — one inscribe updates the toolchain"
136	  buh_line "for every build."
137	  buh_e
138	  buh_line "Inscribe:"
139	  buh_e
140	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
141	  buh_e
142	  buh_line "This mirrors six tool images from upstream into the ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
143	  buh_line "GAR namespace. Takes 2-5 minutes depending on network speed."
144	  buh_e
145	  buyy_cmd_yawp "r260324193326";                   local -r z_ds_example="${z_buym_yelp}"
146	  buh_line "When inscribe completes, it prints a ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} datestamp"
147	  buh_line "(e.g., ${z_ds_example}). Yoke that stamp into ${z_lk_vessel_name}'s"
148	  buh_line "${RBYC_REGIME} so ${RBYC_CONJURE} knows which tool images to use:"
149	  buh_e
150	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY}" "" " <stamp> ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
151	  buh_e
152	  buh_line "Yoke validates both arguments before writing. On success it rewrites"
153	  buh_line "RBRV_RELIQUARY in the ${RBYC_VESSEL} rbrv.env. Commit the change."
154	  buh_e
155	
156	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
157	  buh_e
158	  buh_line "${RBYC_CONJURE} is the build mode where Cloud Build constructs a"
159	  buh_line "${RBYC_VESSEL} image from the project's Dockerfile and build context."
160	  buh_e
161	  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} is the command that triggers the full pipeline —"
162	  buh_line "it reads the ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_RBRV} ${RBYC_REGIME} to determine the mode"
163	  buh_line "(${RBYC_CONJURE}, ${RBYC_BIND}, or ${RBYC_GRAFT}) and acts accordingly:"
164	  buh_e
165	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
166	  buh_e
167	  buh_line "This builds on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build has"
168	  buh_line "public internet access and pulls base images from upstream"
169	  buh_line "registries during the build. (The ${RBYC_AIRGAP} track removes"
170	  buh_line "that dependency.)"
171	  buh_e
172	  buh_line "The pipeline:"
173	  buh_e
174	  buh_line "  1. The host mints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} — a timestamped tag"
175	  buh_line "     identifying this build"
176	  buh_line "  2. A ${RBYC_POUCH} (build context archive) is pushed to GAR"
177	  buh_line "  3. Cloud Build constructs the image across platforms"
178	  buh_line "  4. SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} is generated per platform digest"
179	  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain"
180	  buh_e
181	  buh_warn "Wall-clock: ~15-20 minutes for a 3-platform build."
182	  buh_line "The command blocks until Cloud Build finishes. Use the time"
183	  buh_line "to read ahead — the next steps explain what to look for."
184	  buh_e
185	
186	  buh_step1 "Capture the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
187	  buh_e
188	  buh_line "When ${RBYC_ORDAIN} completes, it writes the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
189	  buh_line "to the ${RBYC_OUTPUT} directory — a fixed-path staging area"
190	  buh_line "that each ${RBYC_TABTARGET} clears and recreates on entry."
191	  buh_line "Read the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from the fact file and export it so"
192	  buh_line "you can copy-paste the commands in the remaining steps:"
193	  buh_e
194	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_NAME}=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
195	  buh_e
196	
197	  buh_step1 "Tour the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} artifacts"
198	  buh_e
199	  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} produces a set of arks"
200	  buh_line "in GAR under ${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/. Each basename serves a specific role:"
201	  buh_e
202	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_pouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
203	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_image="${z_buym_yelp}"
204	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}:{hallmark}-{arch}"; local -r z_sfx_attest="${z_buym_yelp}"
205	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_about="${z_buym_yelp}"
206	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_vouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
207	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_diags="${z_buym_yelp}"
208	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_pouch}"
209	  buh_line "      A FROM SCRATCH OCI image pushed from host to GAR before"
210	  buh_line "      the build. Contains the Dockerfile, scripts, and"
211	  buh_line "      configuration Cloud Build needs. Identical for ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
212	  buh_line "      and ${RBYC_AIRGAP} builds — the pool determines network"
213	  buh_line "      access, not the ${RBYC_POUCH}."
214	  buh_e
215	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_image}"
216	  buh_line "      The consumer image — a multiplatform manifest list."
217	  buh_line "      This is what you pull and run."
218	  buh_e
219	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_attest}"
220	  buh_line "      Per-platform ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}-carrying image (one per platform)."
221	  buh_line "      Shares all layers with -image — only the manifest differs."
222	  buh_line "      These carry the GCB-attested digests used by ${RBYC_VOUCH}."
223	  buh_e
224	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_about}"
225	  buh_line "      ${RBYC_SBOM} (software bill of materials) + build info."
226	  buh_e
227	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_vouch}"
228	  buh_line "      SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verification record."
229	  buh_e
230	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_diags}"
231	  buh_line "      Diagnostics from the build."
232	  buh_e
233	  buh_line "Inspect them:"
234	  buh_e
235	
236	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_TALLY}"
237	  buh_e
238	  buh_line "${RBYC_TALLY} lists all ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} and their health state:"
239	  buh_e
240	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
241	  buh_e
242	  buh_line "Look for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} with health state 'vouched' — that"
243	  buh_line "means SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} was verified."
244	  buh_e
245	
246	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_VOUCH}"
247	  buh_e
248	  buh_line "${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} for each platform"
249	  buh_line "digest in the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. The ${RBYC_ORDAIN} pipeline runs ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
250	  buh_line "automatically. If a build was interrupted before ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
251	  buh_line "completed, run this to reattempt ${RBYC_VOUCH} on untreated ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
252	  buh_e
253	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
254	  buh_e
255	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CONJURE} verdict is full SLSA — Cloud Build produced"
256	  buh_line "this image, and the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain proves it."
257	  buh_e
258	
259	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_PLUMB}"
260	  buh_e
261	  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the ${RBYC_SBOM}, build info, and Dockerfile"
262	  buh_line "that produced the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Two modes:"
263	  buh_e
264	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
265	  buh_line "   Full ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} display — ${RBYC_SBOM} packages, build parameters,"
266	  buh_line "   Dockerfile content."
267	  buh_e
268	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
269	  buh_line "   Compact summary — one-line-per-artifact overview."
270	  buh_e
271	
272	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_SUMMON} the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
273	  buh_e
274	  buh_line "${RBYC_SUMMON} pulls a set of images affiliated with a"
275	  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} that has been ${RBYC_VOUCHED} to your local"
276	  buh_line "Docker image cache:"
277	  buh_e
278	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
279	  buh_e
280	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:{hallmark}"; local -r z_sfx_img2="${z_buym_yelp}"
281	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_img2}"
282	  buh_line "   is a multiplatform manifest list."
283	  buh_line "   Docker resolves it to the image matching your host"
284	  buh_line "   architecture — the same image that ${RBYC_CHARGE} uses when"
285	  buh_line "   starting a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} from cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}."
286	  buh_e
287	
288	  if test "${z_conjure_summoned}" = "1"; then
289	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally (via ${RBYC_SUMMON})"
290	  else
291	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally — run ${RBYC_SUMMON} above"
292	  fi
293	  buh_e
294	
295	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_ABJURE} and ${RBYC_REKON} — ${RBYC_HALLMARK} lifecycle"
296	  buh_e
297	  buh_line "${RBYC_REKON} lists the raw tags for a ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
298	  buh_line "package in GAR. Run it before and after ${RBYC_ABJURE} to see"
299	  buh_line "the full lifecycle:"
300	  buh_e
301	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
302	  buh_e
303	  buh_line "You should see all five durable tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK}:"
304	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}"; local -r z_sfx_list="${z_buym_yelp}"
305	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_list}"
306	  buh_e
307	  buh_line "${RBYC_ABJURE} removes all artifacts for a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
308	  buh_line "from GAR. This is permanent — the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} and all its"
309	  buh_line "tags are deleted:"
310	  buh_e
311	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
312	  buh_e
313	  buh_line "After ${RBYC_ABJURE}, run ${RBYC_REKON} again:"
314	  buh_e
315	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
316	  buh_e
317	  buh_line "The tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} should be gone. The image is no"
318	  buh_line "longer in the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
319	  buh_e
320	
321	  buh_step1 "The pattern"
322	  buh_e
323	  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a structured bundle of six arks in"
324	  buh_line "GAR under ${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/. Know the six basenames"
325	  buh_line "and you can tour any ${RBYC_HALLMARK} by hand."
326	  buh_e
327	  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH}    build context pushed to GAR before the build"
328	  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}    consumer multiplatform manifest — what you pull and run"
329	  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}   per-platform ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}-carrying image (one per architecture)"
330	  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}    ${RBYC_SBOM} plus build info"
331	  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}    SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verification record"
332	  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}    diagnostics from the build"
333	  buh_e
334	  buyy_tt_yawp "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}";     local -r z_tt_plumb_full="${z_buym_yelp}"
335	  buyy_tt_yawp "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}";  local -r z_tt_plumb_compact="${z_buym_yelp}"
336	  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} is the pattern-driven inspector — ${z_tt_plumb_full}"
337	  buh_line "walks every ark, ${z_tt_plumb_compact} names them at a glance."
338	  buh_e
339	
340	  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
341	  buh_e
342	}
343	
344	# eof
345

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director First Cloud Build

set -euo pipefail

test -z "${ZRBHODF_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBHODF_SOURCED=1

rbho_director_first_build() {
  zrbho_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "${RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_BUILD} — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"

  local z_has_director=0
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_has_director=1
  fi

  local z_has_depot=0
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    local z_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  fi

  local z_conjure_summoned=0
  if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local z_project_id=""
    local z_region=""
    if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
      z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
      z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
    fi
    if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
      local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
      local -r z_df_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX}5_repotag.txt"
      local -r z_df_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}7_repotag.txt"
      if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
           > "${z_df_out}" 2>"${z_df_err}"; then
        local z_line=""
        while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
          case "${z_line}" in
            "${z_gar_prefix}"*"${z_vessel}:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_summoned=1; break ;;
          esac
        done < "${z_df_out}"
      fi
    fi
  fi

  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel" "${z_vessel}"; local -r z_lk_vessel_name="${z_buym_yelp}"

  buh_section "${RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_BUILD}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track walks you through the complete ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
  buh_line "provision the builder toolchain, ${RBYC_ORDAIN} your first ${RBYC_VESSEL} via"
  buh_line "Cloud Build, inspect the result, pull it locally, and clean up."
  buh_e
  buh_line "You will build ${z_lk_vessel_name} — the same ${RBYC_SENTRY} you"
  buh_line "already know from the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} track, but this time built by"
  buh_line "Google Cloud Build with full SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}."
  buh_e

  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
  buh_e
  if test "${z_has_director}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
  fi
  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
  fi
  buh_e

  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
    buh_e
    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
    buh_e
    return 0
  fi

  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_NAME}=${z_vessel}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This sets the ${RBYC_VESSEL} you will build throughout the track."
  buh_line "The remaining steps reference it by name."
  buh_e

  buh_step_style "Step " " — "

  buh_step1 "Inscribe the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is a set of six builder tool images (gcloud,"
  buh_line "docker, alpine, syft, binfmt, skopeo) that Cloud Build uses during"
  buh_line "${RBYC_VESSEL} construction. Without it, the ${RBYC_CONJURE} preflight"
  buh_line "check fails."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Think of it as installing the toolchain before your first build."
  buh_line "This is a one-time operation — once inscribed, the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
  buh_line "stays in the ${RBYC_DEPOT} until you choose to refresh it."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Periodically re-inscribe to pick up newer tool versions. All ${RBYC_VESSELS}"
  buh_line "share the same ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — one inscribe updates the toolchain"
  buh_line "for every build."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Inscribe:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This mirrors six tool images from upstream into the ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
  buh_line "GAR namespace. Takes 2-5 minutes depending on network speed."
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "r260324193326";                   local -r z_ds_example="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "When inscribe completes, it prints a ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} datestamp"
  buh_line "(e.g., ${z_ds_example}). Yoke that stamp into ${z_lk_vessel_name}'s"
  buh_line "${RBYC_REGIME} so ${RBYC_CONJURE} knows which tool images to use:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY}" "" " <stamp> ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Yoke validates both arguments before writing. On success it rewrites"
  buh_line "RBRV_RELIQUARY in the ${RBYC_VESSEL} rbrv.env. Commit the change."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CONJURE} is the build mode where Cloud Build constructs a"
  buh_line "${RBYC_VESSEL} image from the project's Dockerfile and build context."
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} is the command that triggers the full pipeline —"
  buh_line "it reads the ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_RBRV} ${RBYC_REGIME} to determine the mode"
  buh_line "(${RBYC_CONJURE}, ${RBYC_BIND}, or ${RBYC_GRAFT}) and acts accordingly:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This builds on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build has"
  buh_line "public internet access and pulls base images from upstream"
  buh_line "registries during the build. (The ${RBYC_AIRGAP} track removes"
  buh_line "that dependency.)"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The pipeline:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. The host mints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} — a timestamped tag"
  buh_line "     identifying this build"
  buh_line "  2. A ${RBYC_POUCH} (build context archive) is pushed to GAR"
  buh_line "  3. Cloud Build constructs the image across platforms"
  buh_line "  4. SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} is generated per platform digest"
  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain"
  buh_e
  buh_warn "Wall-clock: ~15-20 minutes for a 3-platform build."
  buh_line "The command blocks until Cloud Build finishes. Use the time"
  buh_line "to read ahead — the next steps explain what to look for."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "Capture the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "When ${RBYC_ORDAIN} completes, it writes the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_line "to the ${RBYC_OUTPUT} directory — a fixed-path staging area"
  buh_line "that each ${RBYC_TABTARGET} clears and recreates on entry."
  buh_line "Read the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from the fact file and export it so"
  buh_line "you can copy-paste the commands in the remaining steps:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_NAME}=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "Tour the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} artifacts"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} produces a set of arks"
  buh_line "in GAR under ${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/. Each basename serves a specific role:"
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_pouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_image="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}:{hallmark}-{arch}"; local -r z_sfx_attest="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_about="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_vouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}:{hallmark}";        local -r z_sfx_diags="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_pouch}"
  buh_line "      A FROM SCRATCH OCI image pushed from host to GAR before"
  buh_line "      the build. Contains the Dockerfile, scripts, and"
  buh_line "      configuration Cloud Build needs. Identical for ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
  buh_line "      and ${RBYC_AIRGAP} builds — the pool determines network"
  buh_line "      access, not the ${RBYC_POUCH}."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_image}"
  buh_line "      The consumer image — a multiplatform manifest list."
  buh_line "      This is what you pull and run."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_attest}"
  buh_line "      Per-platform ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}-carrying image (one per platform)."
  buh_line "      Shares all layers with -image — only the manifest differs."
  buh_line "      These carry the GCB-attested digests used by ${RBYC_VOUCH}."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_about}"
  buh_line "      ${RBYC_SBOM} (software bill of materials) + build info."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_vouch}"
  buh_line "      SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verification record."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_diags}"
  buh_line "      Diagnostics from the build."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Inspect them:"
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_TALLY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_TALLY} lists all ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} and their health state:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Look for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} with health state 'vouched' — that"
  buh_line "means SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} was verified."
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_VOUCH}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} for each platform"
  buh_line "digest in the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. The ${RBYC_ORDAIN} pipeline runs ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
  buh_line "automatically. If a build was interrupted before ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
  buh_line "completed, run this to reattempt ${RBYC_VOUCH} on untreated ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CONJURE} verdict is full SLSA — Cloud Build produced"
  buh_line "this image, and the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain proves it."
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_PLUMB}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the ${RBYC_SBOM}, build info, and Dockerfile"
  buh_line "that produced the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Two modes:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_line "   Full ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} display — ${RBYC_SBOM} packages, build parameters,"
  buh_line "   Dockerfile content."
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_line "   Compact summary — one-line-per-artifact overview."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_SUMMON} the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_SUMMON} pulls a set of images affiliated with a"
  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} that has been ${RBYC_VOUCHED} to your local"
  buh_line "Docker image cache:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:{hallmark}"; local -r z_sfx_img2="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_img2}"
  buh_line "   is a multiplatform manifest list."
  buh_line "   Docker resolves it to the image matching your host"
  buh_line "   architecture — the same image that ${RBYC_CHARGE} uses when"
  buh_line "   starting a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} from cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}."
  buh_e

  if test "${z_conjure_summoned}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally (via ${RBYC_SUMMON})"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally — run ${RBYC_SUMMON} above"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_ABJURE} and ${RBYC_REKON} — ${RBYC_HALLMARK} lifecycle"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_REKON} lists the raw tags for a ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
  buh_line "package in GAR. Run it before and after ${RBYC_ABJURE} to see"
  buh_line "the full lifecycle:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You should see all five durable tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK}:"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}"; local -r z_sfx_list="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_list}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ABJURE} removes all artifacts for a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_line "from GAR. This is permanent — the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} and all its"
  buh_line "tags are deleted:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "After ${RBYC_ABJURE}, run ${RBYC_REKON} again:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} should be gone. The image is no"
  buh_line "longer in the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "The pattern"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a structured bundle of six arks in"
  buh_line "GAR under ${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}/{hallmark}/. Know the six basenames"
  buh_line "and you can tour any ${RBYC_HALLMARK} by hand."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH}    build context pushed to GAR before the build"
  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}    consumer multiplatform manifest — what you pull and run"
  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}   per-platform ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}-carrying image (one per architecture)"
  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}    ${RBYC_SBOM} plus build info"
  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}    SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verification record"
  buh_line "   ${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}    diagnostics from the build"
  buh_e
  buyy_tt_yawp "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}";     local -r z_tt_plumb_full="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_tt_yawp "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}";  local -r z_tt_plumb_compact="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} is the pattern-driven inspector — ${z_tt_plumb_full}"
  buh_line "walks every ark, ${z_tt_plumb_compact} names them at a glance."
  buh_e

  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
  buh_e
}

# eof

lastPrompt: Look for reliquary treatment in the onboarding handbooks.  Do you see a procedure for installing reliquaries there?  This is a great time to see if that handbook is accurate, correct, and properly edu…

72:  buz_enroll RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY         "rbw-dY"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_yoke"          ""  "Yoke a reliquary stamp into a conjure vessel's rbrv.env"

content.content:
52:  buc_log_args 'Define reliquary inscribe operation file prefix'
53:  readonly ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_reliquary_"
69:zrbfl_inscribe_submit() {
73:  local -r z_reliquary="${2:?Reliquary datestamp required}"
123:    --arg zjq_reliquary    "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_reliquary}" \
131:        _RBGN_RELIQUARY:    $zjq_reliquary
147:    "reliquary_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
148:  rbgu_http_require_ok "Inscribe build submission" "reliquary_build_create"
151:  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "reliquary_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
165:rbfl_inscribe() {
168:  buc_doc_brief "Inscribe a reliquary: mirror all tool images from upstream to a datestamped GAR namespace"
180:  # Compute reliquary datestamp: r + YYMMDDHHMMSS
181:  local -r z_reliquary="r${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}"
182:  buc_info "Reliquary: ${z_reliquary}"
185:  zrbfl_inscribe_submit "${z_token}" "${z_reliquary}"
187:  buf_write_fact "${RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY}" "${z_reliquary}"
189:  buc_success "Inscribe complete — reliquary ${z_reliquary} created"
190:  buc_info "Add RBRV_RELIQUARY=${z_reliquary} to vessel rbrv.env files to use this reliquary"
193:rbfl_yoke() {
199:  buc_doc_brief "Yoke a reliquary stamp into a conjure vessel's rbrv.env — validate both, then rewrite RBRV_RELIQUARY"
219:    bind)    buc_die "Vessel '${z_vessel}' has mode=bind; Yoke only applies to conjure vessels. Bind vessels pin an upstream digest (no Cloud Build, no reliquary)." ;;
220:    graft)   buc_die "Vessel '${z_vessel}' has mode=graft; Yoke only applies to conjure vessels. Graft vessels push a locally-built image (no Cloud Build, no reliquary)." ;;
230:  buc_step "Validating reliquary stamp: ${z_stamp}"
233:  local -r z_list_infix="rbfl_yoke_list"
236:  rbgu_http_require_ok "List reliquary packages" "${z_list_infix}"
239:  local -r z_present_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_yoke_present.txt"
248:    || buc_die "Failed to extract reliquary package names"
282:  test -z "${z_missing}" || buc_die "Reliquary stamp '${z_stamp}' not found in Depot — expected 6 tool images under ${z_rqy_subtree}; missing: ${z_missing}. Re-run tt/rbw-dI.DirectorInscribesReliquary.sh to mint a fresh reliquary, or verify the stamp spelling."
285:  buc_step "Yoking ${z_vessel} to reliquary ${z_stamp}"
293:  local -r z_tmp_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_yoke_rbrv.env.new"

buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
  fi
  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
  fi
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track assumes you have completed ${RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_BUILD} —"
  buh_line "the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is inscribed and you have ${RBYC_ORDAIN}ed at least"
  buh_line "one ${RBYC_VESSEL} on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool."
  buh_e

  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
    buh_e
    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
    buh_e
    return 0
  fi

  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_NAMEPLATE_NAME}=${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CHARGE} and suite commands below reference the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"

file.content:
jq -r --arg subtree "${z_rqy_subtree}" '
    .packages[]?.name
    | sub("^.*/packages/"; "")
    | gsub("%2F"; "/")
    | select(startswith($subtree))
    | ltrimstr($subtree)
  ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_present_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract reliquary package names"

  local z_present=()
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
    z_present+=("${z_line}")
  done < "${z_present_file}"

  local -r z_expected=(
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO}"
  )

  local z_missing=""
  local z_tool=""
  for z_tool in "${z_expected[@]}"; do
    local z_found=0
    local z_i=""
    for z_i in "${!z_present[@]}"; do
      test "${z_present[$z_i]}" = "${z_tool}" || continue
      z_found=1
      break
    done
    case "${z_found}" in
      1) ;;
      *) z_missing="${z_missing}${z_missing:+, }${z_tool}" ;;
    esac
  done

  test -z "${z_missing}" || buc_die "Reliquary stamp '${z_stamp}' not found in Depot — expected 6 tool images under ${z_rqy_subtree}; missing: ${z_missing}. Re-run tt/rbw-dI.DirectorInscribesReliquary.sh to mint a fresh reliquary, or verify the stamp spelling."
  buc_info "Reliquary valid — all 6 tool images present (gcloud, docker, alpine, syft, binfmt, skopeo)"

  buc_step "Yoking ${z_vessel} to reliquary ${z_stamp}"

  local z_rbrv_lines=()
  local z_rbrv_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_rbrv_line || test -n "${z_rbrv_line}"; do

content.content:
100	
101	# Verify reliquary tool images exist in GAR.
102	# Inscribe creates all 6 tool images atomically in one GCB job, so checking
103	# one (docker:latest) is sufficient as a canary for the entire reliquary.
104	# Args: token vessel_dir
105	zrbfd_preflight_reliquary() {
106	  zrbfd_sentinel
107	
108	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
109	  local -r z_vessel_dir="${2:-}"
110	  test -n "${z_token}"      || buc_die "zrbfd_preflight_reliquary: token required"
111	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "zrbfd_preflight_reliquary: vessel_dir required"
112	
113	  local -r z_reliquary="${RBRV_RELIQUARY:-}"
114	  if test -n "${z_reliquary}"; then
115	    buc_step "Verifying reliquary tool images exist in GAR"
116	
117	    local -r z_rqy_canary="${z_reliquary}/docker"
118	    local -r z_rqy_status_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_status.txt"
119	    local -r z_rqy_response_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_response.txt"
120	    local -r z_rqy_stderr_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_stderr.txt"
121	
122	    curl --head -sS \
123	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
124	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
125	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
126	      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
127	      -w "%{http_code}" \
128	      -o "${z_rqy_response_file}" \
129	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_rqy_canary}/manifests/latest" \
130	      > "${z_rqy_status_file}" 2>"${z_rqy_stderr_file}" \
131	      || buc_die "HEAD request failed for reliquary canary: ${z_rqy_canary}:latest — see ${z_rqy_stderr_file}"
132	
133	    local z_rqy_http_code=""
134	    z_rqy_http_code=$(<"${z_rqy_status_file}")
135	    test -n "${z_rqy_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for reliquary check"
136	
137	    if test "${z_rqy_http_code}" = "404"; then
138	      buc_warn "Reliquary not found: ${z_reliquary}"
139	      buc_bare "  The reliquary is a co-versioned set of builder tool images (gcloud, docker,"
140	      buc_bare "  syft, alpine, binfmt, skopeo) inscribed from upstream into your private GAR."
141	      buc_bare "  Air-gapped worker pools cannot pull from the public internet — the reliquary"
142	      buc_bare "  stages these tools so builds can run without egress. All vessels in a depot"
143	      buc_bare "  typically share one reliquary. Inscribe creates a new datestamped set:"
144	      buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
145	      buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
146	      buc_die "Registry preflight failed — reliquary missing from GAR"
